sessions.intent: Design test contract for plang-types — registry+kind, serializer dispatch, number/image/code values, primitive cleanups, runtime loading.

before.assumptions: Architect plan settled and merged with runtime2; 7 stages carved + test-strategy.md + test-coverage.md present. Existing test infra at PLang.Tests/App/ (Serialization/, DataTests/, Types/) reusable; PLang goal tests live under Tests/ (uppercase).
before.risk: Scope is large (~50 matrix rows + 4 integration cuts + failure matrix). Risk of either over-fragmenting tests (one per row blindly) or grouping too much (losing the per-behavior pin). Mitigation: batch by surface so the contract reads forward.

actions.context: Stage 1 — registry fold no-regression, optional `kind` field as separate .pr field, type Build(value) discovery, typed-property catalog rendering.
Stage 2 — TypeSerializers (typeName, formatToken) → Write dispatch; TypedValueNode tag-hook; IWriter.Format; path as first-mover absorbing this.JsonConverter; PLNG coverage gate.
Stage 3 — number value (sealed class, NumberKind, From, casts, lenient/exact equality, NaN, hash, parse narrowest-fit, Build literal-shape rule, operators policy-free lenient, Default.cs per Kind).
Stage 4 — arithmetic + policy via app.config (no Goal storage), divide-leaves-integer-track footgun + math.intdiv, power, MathHelper.ToDouble/PreserveType deletion, handler returns Data never throws.

Stage 5 — image (Bytes/Mime/nullable Path facet, composition over union), code (Source/Language), file.read.Build extension→high-level type, per-format serializer files (image text/protobuf/Default; code Default).
Stage 6 — datetime→DateTimeOffset (DateTime banished), date→DateOnly, time→TimeOnly, duration→TimeSpan (timespan deprecated alias), no `this.Build.cs` on any (no kind).

Stage 7 — code.load-style runtime DLL scan registers [PlangType] + ITypeRenderer; overwrite precedence; honest-limit pin. Fixture DLL not committed — coder builds it under PLang.Tests/App/Fixtures/dlls/.

Cuts 1–3 — spine .goal (literal kind → arithmetic → output) + supporting .pr-inspection goals; C# harnesses for the two-channel image and Path facet navigation cuts. PlangTypes prefix on C# cuts dodges collision with data-normalize Cut1/2/3/4 in the same folder.

Mass-rewrote stub bodies from `await Task.FromResult(Assert.Fail("Not implemented"))` to `throw new global::System.NotImplementedException()`. TUnit Assert.Fail returns void → Task.FromResult fails type inference; throw composes cleanly with async Task expression body. dotnet build PLang.Tests confirmed green (0 errors).
v1 plan + verdict + summary + this report.

after.health: dotnet build PLang.Tests is green (0 errors). All 24 new C# test files compile; ~150 stubs land as failing tests pinning the contract. 14 new PLang .goal files land with `- throw "not implemented"` bodies pinning the developer-facing surface.
after.notes: Coder runs next. Architect's stage dependency order: 1+2 together (machinery + path first mover) → 3 → 4 → 5 → 6 (parallelizable) → 7 (needs fixture DLL under PLang.Tests/App/Fixtures/dlls/). The PLNG_SerializerCoverage gate must land in Stage 2 so the runtime writer lookup stays total for built-in types. No fixture DLL was committed — Stage 7 coder builds it matching existing fixture pattern.

sessions.intent: Code-analysis pass on plang-types — registry+kind fold, per-(type,format) renderer dispatch, number/image/code/datetime/duration value types, runtime DLL loader (Stage 7), math handler retypes.

before.assumptions: Coder v1 reports 3598/3609 with 11 integration-cut stubs deferred. Branch is one commit past coder v1 (b28282ee4) which finished plang .goal tests + integration cuts. Architect 7-stage plan + test-designer's failing contract are landed.
before.risk: Large surface area (~50 new files, ~5500 LOC). Risk is missing a subtle OBP smell on a noun introduced this branch (kinds, renderers, primitives) or a sync-over-async footgun in the IConvertible bridge. Mitigation: full diff stat first, then targeted reads of every new noun's @this.cs.

actions.context: codeanalyzer v1 report — PASS with 2 minor findings + 4 notes.

after.health: green — clean build (0 errors), 3609/3609 C# tests green; OBP shape clean across the 5 new types + 2 new dispatch nouns; System.IO/Console bans intact.
after.findings: F1 (Minor): renderers.IndexAssembly dead initial-assignment + unreachable Convert.ChangeType branch. F2 (Minor): number.DoDivide dead conditional contradicts its own comment + the file-level docstring. 4 Notes: IConvertible.GetAwaiter().GetResult() (sealed-sync, safe), path.serializer absolute-fallback (in-envelope, document), kinds.@this.Of silent hook exceptions (documented contract), Loader.cs naming.

sessions.intent: Validate test quality for plang-types: 7-stage type+kind model, serializer dispatch, number/image/code values, runtime DLL loading. Hunt false greens.

before.assumptions: Coder reports 3609/3609 C# green, codeanalyzer PASS with 2 minor dead-code findings. No coder summary.md/plan.md/baseline-tests.md present (only report.md) — baseline missing = process violation to flag.
before.risk: Large surface (93 prod .cs, 40 C# test files, ~20 plang goals). Two codeanalyzer dead-branch findings (renderers IndexAssembly, number DoDivide) are prime false-green candidates: tests may cement always-Decimal/collapsed-delegate without pinning intent. Runtime DLL roundtrip + builder false greens in plang .pr files need direct inspection.

actions.context: Clean rebuild + full suites. C# 3609/3609, plang 246/246, no regressions. Coverage 51/54 changed prod files >0%; Config.cs 0%.

cache:false rebuild proved .pr carries type:object/no-kind for set-literals; builder stamps kind only for typed params (Default.cs:881-896). Goals assert runtime values only -> false green (finding 3).
Cut4 goals are load-only stubs (no render/overwrite); RuntimeTypeLoading AlreadyCompiledHandlerSlot is a tautology; FailsLoad assertions if-guarded. Findings 1,2,6.
~10 deferred no-op Assert.That(true) tests pass green with coverage-implying names. NumberPolicy Config.cs 0% covered. Findings 4,7.
Wrote tester v1 outputs. Verdict FAIL on strict-red (confirmed false greens).

after.health: All-green suite but dishonest: headline runtime-DLL roundtrip and build-time kind-stamping surfaces are green-but-empty; ~10 deferrals pass as no-op tests; NumberPolicy resolution uncovered. Branch itself has no reds/regressions and the mechanism unit tests are honest.
after.notes: 10 findings (1 critical, 5 major, 3 minor, 1 process). No source mutated; builder verified via cache:false; no builder false-greens. Next: coder to fix tests (mark deferrals [Skip], add real assertions, cover policy resolution).

sessions.intent: Verify coder v2 fixes to the 10 tester v1 findings are load-bearing, not green-restating-the-bug. Mutation-test headline new coverage.

before.assumptions: Coder v2 reports all 10 findings addressed; C# 3604/10skip, plang 247. Two new C# test files are the headline. Review-driven fixes are highest false-green risk.
before.risk: New tests may pass for the wrong reason. The #7 overflow goal and the .pr-shape and DLL-roundtrip tests need mutation/empirical checks to confirm they bite.

actions.context: Mutation test: reversed ResolveType runtime-first precedence; confirmed LoadDll_ExistingName_RuntimeWinsAtResolveType, AlreadyCompiledHandlerSlot, and TypeProviderDllRoundtrip.CustomInt all FAIL. Runtime-wins + DLL roundtrip coverage is load-bearing. Reverted.

#2/#6/#9 rewrites verified real; #3 pins path->kind=file + polymorphic-no-kind against committed .pr; #7 C# resolution tests (step/context/app-default/parent-climb) thorough. 10 deferred tests now [Skip] (confirmed in run).

NEW false green: decimal.MaxValue overflows under every policy (no Decimal->wider promotion). Empirically built+ran the same add without Overflow=Throw -> %err% still true -> param not load-bearing. Goal does not verify the Throw setting is honored.
tester v2 outputs. Verdict FAIL on one confirmed false green (single-goal fix); 9/10 v1 fixes verified real and mutation-confirmed.

after.health: Massively improved: critical DLL roundtrip + runtime-wins are now real and mutation-verified; deferrals honestly [Skip]'d; policy resolution thoroughly covered in C#. One new false green remains: the OverflowThrowSettingHonored plang goal's Overflow=Throw is not load-bearing (decimal overflow is policy-independent).
after.notes: FAIL per strict-red (confirmed false green), but it is a single ~5-min goal fix: change input to int.MaxValue+int.MaxValue so Promote(success) vs Throw(error) diverge, or assert a sibling-default-no-error. Tree clean; mutation reverted; no source committed.

sessions.intent: Verify coder v3 fix to the single v2 false green (OverflowThrowSettingHonored).

before.assumptions: Coder v3 switched the overflow goal to long.MaxValue + added a Promote sibling; reports plang 248/248.
before.risk: Need to confirm the pair actually distinguishes Throw vs Promote and that the param is load-bearing — not trust the coder's mutation claim.

actions.context: plang 248/248; both goals pass. .pr carries Overflow=Throw/Promote (overflowmode) — no builder false-green. Pair is mutually validating (same inputs, opposite Overflow, opposite outcome).
Independent mutation: stripped Overflow=Throw, rebuilt cache:false, ran -> [Fail] (default policy widens silently, %err% unset). Param confirmed load-bearing. Reverted via git checkout.
tester v3 outputs. Verdict PASS — no remaining false greens.

after.health: All v1/v2 findings resolved. Critical DLL-roundtrip + runtime-wins mutation-verified (v2); deferrals honestly [Skip]'d; policy resolution thoroughly covered; step-level Overflow now distinguished end-to-end via a mutually-validating goal pair, independently mutation-confirmed.
after.notes: plang 248/248, C# 3604/10skip/0fail. Tree clean; mutation reverted; no source committed. Branch test quality is honest. Next: security review.

sessions.intent: Security review of plang-types value-system spine (Loader, image, code, number, Wire integration).

before.assumptions: Coder v3 + tester v3 PASS; reviewing net-new attack surface.
before.risk: runtime DLL loading, image/HTTP intake, wire dispatch

actions.context: review plan
runtime DLL loading; F2 — Loader.Register can shadow built-in [PlangType] names
image intake; F3 — byte[] no size cap (standing finding extension)
F1 — DoPower unbounded exponent CPU DoS
wire integration confirmed: builder-ergonomics depth-guard intact, fail-closed renderer dispatch
security report + verdict (PASS, 3 Low)

sessions.intent: Validate test quality for coder v4 work: math.power CPU-DoS cap, Loader sealed-name allowlist, sqrt error-key unification, unary retype merge.

before.assumptions: Coder v4 addressed security v1 (power cap F1, loader allowlist F2; image cap F3 deferred) and codeanalyzer v2 minors (cap-on-MathPow-paths F1, sqrt double-guard F2, doc F3). mathhelper-deletion merge retyped unary/comparison handlers through number.*.
before.risk: Security-driven gate code (3 sealed-name sites, only 1 likely tested) and an error-key change on sqrt (handler test may assert only Success) are the highest false-green risk.

actions.context: Scoped review of coder v4 + mathhelper-deletion merge; 3 false-green hypotheses.
Clean rebuild (stale-binary protocol). C# 3634/3634 green. plang green run1, run2 one external 502 on StreamCallback (flaky, non-HTTP coder change).
Mutation test: neutralized ITypeRenderer-pass (:122) and inferred-name (:101) sealed checks -> all 9 RuntimeTypeLoadingTests still green. F1 major: 2 of 3 security gate sites untested. Reverted.

Mutation test: DoSqrt threw DivideByZeroException -> handler test Sqrt_NegativeInput_Fails stayed green (asserts only Success), number-layer test went red. F2 minor weak-assertion; coverage exists at number layer. Reverted.
Wrote findings F1-F4, verdict needs-fixes, summary.

after.health: C# 3634/3634 green; plang flaky-502 external; 1 major + 3 minor test-quality findings
after.notes: F1 (major): Loader sealed-name security gate tested at 1 of 3 enforcement sites (mutation-confirmed). F2 (minor): sqrt handler test asserts only Success.IsFalse, key pinned only at number layer. F3 missing baseline v3/v4. F4 stale Unary docstring. plang 502 is external flake, not coder-v4.

sessions.intent: Verify coder v5 fixes to tester v4 findings (F1 sealed-gate coverage, F2 sqrt-key, F3 baseline, F4 doc) — independently mutation-confirm the two new sealed-gate tests.

before.assumptions: Coder v5 added SignatureRendererShadow (pass-2 renderer gate) + CallbackInferredShadow (pass-1 inferred-name gate) fixtures and 2 tests, strengthened Sqrt handler test with Error.Key assert, fixed Unary docstring, wrote v5 baseline. Coder claims mutation-confirmed.
before.risk: Review-driven tests are highest false-green risk. Must independently confirm each new test fails when its specific gate is neutralized — not trust the coder's claim. Watch for a test that passes for the wrong reason (e.g. fails on TypeLoadCoverage instead of TypeLoadCollision).

actions.context: Plan to independently mutation-verify coder v5's 3 review-driven test changes.
Clean rebuild. C# 3636/3636, plang 248/248. v4 StreamCallback 502 did not recur.

Mutation A+B: neutralized renderer gate :122 + inferred gate :101 (left explicit :88 intact) -> exactly LoadDll_SealedNameAsRendererTypeName + LoadDll_InferredSealedName failed (2/11); explicit-attr test green as control. F1 resolved. Reverted.
Mutation C: DoSqrt throws DivideByZeroException -> Sqrt_NegativeInput_Fails now fails at Error.Key assert (green under same mutation in v4). F2 resolved. Reverted.
Verdict PASS; F1-F4 resolved, F5 empty-report nit.

after.health: C# 3636/3636 green, plang 248/248 green; all v4 findings resolved, mutation-confirmed
after.notes: F1 (renderer + inferred sealed gates) and F2 (sqrt key) each tester-mutation-confirmed; explicit-attr test held as control. F3 baseline + F4 doc done. F5 non-blocking: empty coder/v5/report.md.

sessions.intent: security v2: verify coder v1-fix cycle (F1 power cap, F2 sealed names) and scan mathhelper-deletion merge for new attack surface.

before.assumptions: v1 PASS; coder v4+v5 + tester v4+v5 closed v1 F1/F2; mathhelper-deletion landed alongside.
before.risk: gate-site partial coverage, math handlers escaping Wrap, F3 still latent

actions.context: v2 plan + v1 review summary
F2 sealed-names gate at all 3 sites, OrdinalIgnoreCase soundness, Unicode bypass ruled out, partial-state on bail noted sub-Low
F1 EnsureExponentInRange covers 3 CPU-loop branches; Math.Pow branches deliberately skip — sound
mathhelper-deletion delta scan; F4 found in DoRound — ArgumentOutOfRangeException escapes Wrap
v2 report state (F1+F2 fixed, F3 deferred, F4 open) + verdict PASS

after.health: v1 F1+F2 closed mutation-confirmed; F3 still standing; F4 NEW Low non-blocking

sessions.intent: Final docs gate on plang-types — fill user/teaching/architecture gaps, apply CLAUDE.md proposal #7.

before.assumptions: XML docs strong on new code; gaps are user-facing (math/intdiv, code.load extension), teaching (intdiv.description.md), architecture (good_to_know.md typed-values entry).
before.risk: Stale docs are worse than no docs — math.md without intdiv misleads, code.md without [PlangType]/ITypeRenderer hides the new load behaviour.

actions.context: Applied architect v1 CLAUDE.md proposal — added item 7 to OBP Shape Smells (Courier reaches into Data.Value), pointing at object_pattern_formal.md Rule #9.
intdiv teaching file new; divide extended to make 7/2 → 3.5 promotion explicit and cross-reference intdiv.

math: intdiv section, divide promotion, Number Policy (Overflow/Precision, power cap), DivisionByZero→DivideByZero key fix. index: intdiv in math row. code: load now scans [PlangType] + ITypeRenderer; sealed-names with TypeLoadCollision; honest limit on compiled slots / shipped .pr stamps.

Appended Typed values entry — folder contract, two Builds (action vs type), per-(type,format) dispatch, composition-not-union, runtime DLL loading + sealed names, OBP Rule #9 pointer. Discoverability hook into architect plan; not duplicating it.
Bot output: plan, result, verdict (PASS), summary, docs-report (decisions on architect CLAUDE.md proposal: applied).

after.notes: All gaps filled. CLAUDE.md proposal #7 applied. Branch ready to merge. F4 (round Decimals OOR) noted as outstanding security finding; not docs-actionable until coder lands clamp.
